prose: Benzene frontier-orbital calculation: DFT, tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit), PySCF RKS, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Single-point on the user-supplied geometry (not re-optimized at DFT). SCF converged in 8 cycles. HOMO = −7.0468329 eV, LUMO = −0.41574728 eV, HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.6310857 eV (headline result). Koopmans vertical IP = 7.0468329 eV, vertical EA = 0.41574728 eV. Near-degeneracy of HOMO/HOMO-1 and LUMO/LUMO+1 is consistent with benzene's D6h symmetry (e1g and e2u π orbitals). All integrity checks passed (trustworthy: true). No warnings reported.
